feat.name: Resounding Bravery
feat.text: Even your fears serve as fuel for your fighting spirit. When you critically succeed at a Will save against a foe’s ability, you gain a +1 status bonus to saves and a number of temporary Hit Points equal to half your level for 1 minute. These benefits are doubled if you critically succeed against a fear effect.

traits.name: Fighter
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the fighter class.
